flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rowan-Cabarrus Community College rose 205% between 2006 and 2009 (13.9% → 42.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rowan-Cabarrus Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rowan-Cabarrus Community College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $6.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rowan-Cabarrus Community College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $2.1k).
